title: Parabolic Mirage
relevance_summary: Sybil attack followed by market manipulation on a decentralized finance platform

prevention.rule: Block any tx that sends tokens to multiple newly created wallets within a short timeframe

red_flags: sudden creation of multiple new wallets
large volume of token transfers to these wallets
summary: MYX Finance used a Sybil attack to manipulate the market, creating numerous new wallets to send large volumes of tokens, leading to a significant market manipulation and loss of funds.
